case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. REBECCA K SCOTT ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2024 CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
